concept: Create a sports game involving a fictional competition where teams of players manipulate gravity wells to guide a neutral orb into scoring positions. Players position and activate personal gravity devices that create attraction or repulsion fields affecting the orb's trajectory. Team coordination is essential as individual gravity effects are weak, but properly sequenced fields can create complex orb movements that opponents struggle to counter. The arenas feature neutral gravity-affecting elements that can be strategically triggered to create momentum advantages. The championship takes place in orbital stadiums where ambient gravity fluctuations add an additional layer of unpredictability to matches.
